testcases.input: money = 20, children = 3 Output: 1 Explanation: The maximum number of children with 8 dollars will be 1. One of the ways to distribute the money is: - 8 dollars to the first child. - 9 dollars to the second child. - 3 dollars to the third child. It can be proven that no distribution exists such that number of children getting 8 dollars is greater than 1.
